name: openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG Repository List

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The OpenDesign team is responsible for user experience of the openEuler community.. The SIG has 7 core members and maintains 17 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at opendesign@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG maintains 17 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-OpenDesign.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-OpenDesign SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Zhe Sun, Sting Zhang, Wendong Cao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
